strengths: ~17 years of continuous software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure, satisfying the 15-year minimum
Recent hands-on AI and agent infrastructure work at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks, showing genuine builder engagement with current AI tooling
Demonstrated entrepreneurial and open-source ownership through GISCollective and multiple self-initiated libraries/platforms across a long career
concerns: No advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in an AI-related field, and no evidence of recognized AI expertise such as published research, conference leadership, or AI platform products at scale
Current and historical titles (Senior/Staff Software Developer) reflect a hands-on IC track well below the director-level principal seniority the role requires

No demonstrated experience in the strategic advisory, customer-facing, or cross-organizational thought leadership dimensions central to this role (advising strategic customers, shaping cloud product strategy)
response.justification: Bogdan is a capable, polyglot senior engineer with genuine breadth across full-stack, infrastructure, and emerging AI tooling, and his tenure comfortably meets the years-of-experience floor. However, the role is a director-level strategic IC position requiring recognized AI thought leadership, executive-level advisory influence, and demonstrated ownership of AI-powered products or platforms at scale — none of which are evidenced in the resume. His AI exposure is recent and tooling-level rather than strategic, and his career arc shows no progression toward the kind of cross-organizational influence or customer-facing strategy work the role demands.
